data.title: Studies explore: GLP-1 receptor agonist use and its impact on long-term musculoskeletal health and orthopaedic surgical outcomes
data.description: New research studies have recently investigated the implications of using GLP-1 receptor agonists on long-term musculoskeletal health and outcomes of orthopaedic surgeries. The studies, released on 02-Mar-2026 by the American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons through PR Newswire, highlight significant findings in this field. These findings suggest a possible correlation between the use of GLP-1 receptor agonists and improved long-term musculoskeletal health. Additionally, the research indicates potential positive effects on orthopaedic surgical outcomes. This new information provides valuable insights into the benefits of incorporating GLP-1 receptor agonists in treatments, with implications for improving patient health and surgical results.

data.title: How Morgan Stanley, TD Cowen, Citibank Are Embracing Bitcoin
data.description: Financial giants Morgan Stanley, TD Bank, and Citigroup have revealed plans to incorporate Bitcoin into traditional finance systems as regulatory certainty improves and institutional interest increases. During the "Bitcoin for Corporations" panel at Strategy World 2026 on Feb. 28, the banks explored the potential integration of digital assets into conventional financial frameworks. Morgan Stanley is broadening its crypto services on the E*TRADE platform, allowing clients to trade spot cryptocurrencies. Amy Oldenburg, the bank's digital asset strategy leader, disclosed the development of in-house custody and exchange infrastructure for clients to securely hold Bitcoin with Morgan Stanley.

data.title: Eightpoint Unveils the Next Evolution of NewsNow Home, Bringing Smarter Hyperlocal News to Android
data.description: Eightpoint has introduced a significant update to NewsNow Home, the Android news platform. This upgrade offers personalized news using business intelligence, hyperlocal relevance, and a more peaceful approach to staying informed. The aim is to provide users with timely hyperlocal information directly to their home screen.

data.title: Curve Finance alleges PancakeSwap copied their code and must get licensing to use it.
data.description: Curve Finance has informed PancakeSwap that in order to utilize the code developed by Curve and collaborate, it must complete the necessary licensing procedures. The requirements have been set by the Curve Finance team and all operations must comply with them.

data.title: Dfns Launches Payouts
data.description: Dfns has recently unveiled Payouts, an innovative API tailored for institutions seeking to seamlessly switch stablecoins to fiat and disburse payments to various bank accounts. This solution prioritizes maintaining wallet-level governance and controls. Presently, many fintechs and institutions face challenges with adhering to a singular payout provider or utilizing vertically integrated systems that bundle routing, pricing, custody, and settlement. By leveraging Payouts, entities can diversify their off-ramp strategies and enhance operational efficiencies.
